name: What's the process after I report my work injury in West Valley City?
description: Report > employer/doctor forms > insurer decision in 21 days.[2]

mainEntity.name: What's the process after I report my work injury in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report > employer/doctor forms > insurer decision in 21 days.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Employer files Form 122 in 7 days, doctor Form 123; insurer decides in 21 days, pays if approved.[2] You get rights form.[2] Key factors: Extension possible to 45 days; appeal denials. Practical guidance: Follow up weekly, attend all treatments; track payments. Commission helps free.[2]
